name: Wood and Glass Cake Stand - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Elevate your dessert presentation with this Wood and Glass Cake Stand from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. This covered cake stand features a round wooden base and a clear glass dome-shaped lid that helps keep cakes fresh for longer. The mixed-material design elevates the presentation of your cakes, and the stand is also great for storing other pastries.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
